div1.entryFree: Trance, want of self-consciousness, a state of being beside one's self; 1) ecstasy: 'tis time to stir him from his t. Shr. I, 1, 182. 2) bewilderment: disturb his hours of rest with restless --s, Lucr. 974. both stood, like old acquaintance in a t., met far from home, wondering each other's chance, Lucr. 974
